docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER SHEARER, ALEXANDER RHEE, CHRISTINE HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
DECREE CHANGING NAME GRANTED. NEW NAMES OF MINOR: KIERAN YOUNGJOON RHEE-SHEARER FILED BY PETITIONER SHEARER, ALEXANDER RHEE, CHRISTINE
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER SHEARER, ALEXANDER RHEE, CHRISTINE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE, 4 CERTIFIED COPY) NAME CHANGE DECREE PAID BY PETITIONER SHEARER, ALEXANDER

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2019, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY AS SCHEDULED THIS DAY FOR OSC HEARING FOR CHANGE OF NAME. DEPT. 514. PETITIONER WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE FILE. NO OBJECTIONS TO THE PROPOSED CHANGE OF NAME WERE MADE AT THE HEARING. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE PETITION ARE TRUE, CORRECT AND SUFFICIENT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. DECREE CHANGING NAME WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: GAIL DEKERON. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (SAN FRANCISCO DAILY JOURNAL) 9/4/19, 9/11/19, 9/18/19, AND 9/25/19.
